reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 5
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 6
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 7
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 8
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night India Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 21-Night India Coastal Explorer | Odyssey of the Seas | Royal Caribbean International
seo.metaDescription: Book a 21-night India cruise onboard Odyssey of the Seas of Royal Caribbean International. Visiting Mumbai, Goa, Cochin (Kochi). Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
